nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: I still do not understand. What is this place?

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Am I dead? Did the pills kill me?

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: Sounds come from afar.

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Find the sound.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Hey Kael!

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: A weird looking creature wearing a cape walks toward you.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Who are you??? How do you know my name?!?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Gosh, just calm down will you? We are energeons.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: What???

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: If you would just stop freaking out, we can explain, you know?

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: I told you to go slow, Rona... now Kael is freaked out.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You see a bunch of colorful creatures arguing.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Okay, just stop fighting. You all are scaring Kael.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Kael, this is your own consciousness. You are in your own mind.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: What? How?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: We do not really know, Kael... but this must have been a sign.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: It is hopeless, Rona... what will Kael even do?

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: I am Keiko, Kael. This is Feanor, Murial, and Rona.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Is this a dream? Why do I feel like the energeons look like me? I see them in me.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Kael, I am sure you are here for a reason. You will help us find the light.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Light?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: What will this clueless guy do to help us? We are like this because of him in the first place.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Kael is us, and we are a part of Kael. The light is something... or someone... that will light us up. Light you up. We do not know what it is, but it is somewhere in your own brain.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: After finding it... can I get out?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: We do hope that is the outcome. Are you not tired of living like this?

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Day and night, you have been trapped in an endless nothing. This is your chance to take your life back.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: ...Okay. What should we do?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: That easy?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Great. Let us get started.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: You all do not even know what to do... what do you mean start-

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: A loud crash, low rumble, and violent shake.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The ground trembles. The sky glitches between night and something unnatural. A distorted pulse echoes in the distance.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: (panicking) W-wait... something is wrong... it is happening again...

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Of course it is. This place has been unstable for ages.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: No... this is different. The cycle is breaking.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: ...yeah. that does not look good.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: What is that?

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: It is the cycle... it is supposed to keep everything in balance.

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The screen shakes.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: And clearly, it is failing. If this collapses, so do we.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: It is getting worse! Run!

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Run.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Everyone barely survives, then sees a distorted glowing structure.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: What is that? The light?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Nope, that is the Nocturne Heart.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: As you can see, it is falling apart.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: I guess it could even crash any second.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: HEY! Do not say that, we also will crash if that happens.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Not that I care...

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: (quiet, uneasy) ...this is because of me, is it not?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: (angry) Yeah? You think?! You ignored the doctors, what did you expect?!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: (trying to stay positive) Okay... yeah, things are bad, but we are here now! That has to mean something-

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: (cuts in) No, it does not! You keep saying that like it fixes anything!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: (starting to snap) At least I am trying to do something instead of just yelling!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Because someone has to say it! This is his fault!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: And now he is here, so we deal with it!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Oh yeah? With what plan?!

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The screen shakes.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: (frustrated) I am going somewhere else.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: (mad) Well that is great!

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: (panics) Murial, where are you going???

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Well, things escalated...

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: (sad) We are supposed to solve this together...

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The shaking worsens.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Those restless nights, you never knew how hard it impacted yourself.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: What are we going to do...

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Investigate the Nocturne Heart.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The structure pulses unevenly. Four fragments surround it, each glowing differently.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: As you interact with them, each fragment reacts in a different way.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: (quiet) ...these parts...

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: ...they feel familiar...

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: W-wait... that one... it looks like me...

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: ...yeah. I see it too.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Then... maybe this is not random.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Maybe... each of you... belongs to one of these.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: That means we can fix it, right? Let us try!

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Stabilize the Nocturne Heart.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The Heart reacts as you focus on each energeon. The fragments begin to glow, slowly falling into rhythm.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: For a moment... the light begins to connect.

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: A soft harmony turns into distortion.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The rhythm breaks. One fragment remains dark.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: (low) ...it is not complete...

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: ...we are missing something.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: (soft) ...there were four...

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: ...yeah.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: There are four parts.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: ...Murial...

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: (frustrated) Seriously? We need him now??

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: ...looks like it.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: ...whether we like it or not.

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Find Murial.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You see Murial standing at a distance, anger all over his face.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Murial!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: What?

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Please come back, we need you.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: So now you need me? Rona does not seem to think that!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Sure thing, I do not need you!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Okay then!

nodes.speaker: Choice
nodes.text: Kael can step up or stay silent.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Rona, Murial is a part of all of us. We would not be able to fix this without him.

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The screen shakes hard.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: ...you are right. Murial, we need you! Please come back.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: (surprised but softens) Huh?

nodes.speaker: Choice
nodes.text: Silent path: Kael says nothing.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Stop being so angry all the time!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: I-

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: Either option ruins part of the map structure. The map becomes more glitchy and disoriented.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Everything falls apart. Murial is on the other side.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: (regret) Murial...

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Is Murial going to be okay...
